v.1
Lesson 14 Summary Guide
 Consider implementing the 50:10 principle – 50 minutes of
content creation followed by a 10 minute break
o Focus on the critical task and do nothing else
for 50 minutes
 Clear your mind during the 10 minute period (exercise, have a
drink, listen to music, read, etc.)
 Eliminate distractions during your FOCUS sessions (no texts,
phone, internet, etc.)
 Do your 50/10 at the start of your day
 Create four quadrants of teaching
o WHY do you need to learn this stuff?
o WHAT are you going to learn?
o HOW are you going to do it?
o WHAT IF I implement this?
 Example: List building
o WHY do I need a list?
o WHAT is a list?
o HOW do I build a list?

-- 1 of 2 --

2
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
o WHAT IF I build a list (What will this mean to my
business?)
 Autoresponder sequence
o First couple messages should begin with the WHY
o Next couple focus on WHAT
o Then shift to the HOW and WHAT IF
 Important to be aware of the different types of people that are
on your list
o WHAT IF oriented persons are the Entrepreneurs
o HOW oriented persons are the Engineers
o WHAT oriented persons are the Academic type
o WHY oriented persons are like the Sales People
Most people resonate with the WHY – important to really
focus on this at the start of the sequence
 Tell them about yourself in the WHY
o Be personal
o Speak to the fears and frustrations you’ve had that they
will be able to identify with
o Remember, you are selling yourself in essence (why
should they listen to you?)
 Be sure to answer their main objections in the sequence one at
a time
 Create a “cheat sheet” for your Avatar documenting their
hopes, dreams, fears and frustrations (see Lesson 5)
